title: Add SKTouchCanvasView Blazor library with touch/pointer event support
body:
- [x] Add SKTouchCanvasView Blazor library with touch/pointer support
- [x] Fix touch drawing bugs from #357
- [x] Address review feedback (CSS, auto-invalidate, TypeScript, no container)
- [x] Use Microsoft.TypeScript.MSBuild; keep .js and .map in source control
- [x] Fix touch coordinate scaling in sample app — multiply touch coords by DPI so lines draw where the user touches

![Touch page with DPI scaling](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3b809c96-6e6e-4804-9ec8-d067c80088ed)
